market_pulse: Competitive energy elevated across Strip venues; DJ Pauly D bookings dominate weekend calendar at OMNIA/Hakkasan, while LIV maintains talent advantage with Tiësto and David Guetta residencies.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA running 'DESEO: Latin Sundays' successfully; Hakkasan has 'R&Bae Wednesdays' series generating high engagement but LIV has no comparable Latin/R&B themed night
content_gaps.suggested_action: Consider weekly Latin or Afrobeat themed night at LIV to capture underserved demographic on mid-week

content_gaps.description: XS/Zouk featuring influencer review content and guest list access stories; LIV Instagram shows lineups but lacks behind-the-scenes VIP influencer partnerships
content_gaps.suggested_action: Seed LIV Nightclub reviews/BTS with micro-influencers (@globeth0tter, similar travel/nightlife creators) to boost TikTok discovery

content_gaps.description: Zouk using consistent countdown posts; TAO Beach highlighting April talent (Jonas Blue, Louis the Child); LIV events page active but social lacks urgency triggers
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase Instagram Stories countdown stickers 72h-24h before marquee nights; test 'last tickets' urgency messaging

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest review of LIV Nightclub as guest-list attendee; praised vibe and DJ experience. Also reviewed XS Nightclub comparatively. High engagement on both Vegas nightclub reviews.
